explanation: This command modifies the 'CompanyName' version string of an executable using rcedit-x64.exe. It aligns with the Sigma rule's detection of metadata tampering via rcedit and the use of '--set-' in the command line.

This command alters the 'OriginalFileName' resource string of an executable using rcedit-x86.exe. It matches the Sigma rule's criteria for metadata tampering and includes the required '--set-' command-line pattern.

This command changes the 'ProductName' version string of an executable using rcedit-x64.exe. It fits the Sigma rule's detection logic by modifying PE metadata and using the '--set-' command-line syntax.

This command modifies the 'LegalCopyright' version string of an executable using rcedit-x86.exe. It aligns with the Sigma rule's focus on metadata tampering and includes the required '--set-' command-line pattern.
